bead.title: service: translate Policy routing requests and public errors
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The public routing surface still uses Profile fields and profile-named errors. Phase 4 needs the public service request/decision vocabulary aligned with the internal v0.11 policy model.

SCOPE
In scope: service.go RouteRequest, RouteDecision, RoutePowerPolicy policy field names; service_routing.go request translation; routing_errors.go public policy error types; service routing tests.
Out of scope: removing ModelRef fields, session-log model-ref projection, CLI route-status flags, provider/model billing metadata.

IMPLEMENTATION NOTES
Rename RouteRequest.Profile to Policy and add AllowLocal/Require fields if they are not already present. Rename RouteDecision.RequestedProfile to RequestedPolicy. Rename RoutePowerPolicy.Profile to PolicyName. Replace ErrProfilePinConflict/ErrNoProfileCandidate/ErrUnknownProfile with ErrPolicyRequirementUnsatisfied, ErrUnknownPolicy, and ErrUnsatisfiablePin shapes mirroring internal routing errors. Translate req.Policy="air-gapped" into routing require=["no_remote"].
bead.acceptance:
1. `go test . -run TestServiceTranslatesPolicyAirGappedToRequireNoRemote -count=1` passes.
2. `go test . -run TestErrPolicyRequirementUnsatisfiedShape -count=1` passes.
3. `grep -rn "RequestedProfile\|RoutePowerPolicy.*Profile\|ErrProfilePinConflict\|ErrNoProfileCandidate\|ErrUnknownProfile" service.go service_*.go routing_errors.go --include="*.go"` returns zero matches in production files.
4. `go test ./... -count=1` passes.

events.body: {"rationale":"","score":0,"suggested_fixes":null,"waivers_applied":null,"warning":"lint hook: dispatch-failure: ResolveRoute: policy \"air-gapped\" has no candidate satisfying local endpoint: 5 candidates rejected"}
